ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Personal access token for GitHub API to increase rate limits
ast.target: 用于提高 GitHub API 速率限制的个人访问令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, refreshing updates existing embedded star text. When disabled, embedded star text is left unchanged and may show an older value than the refreshed star count.
ast.target: 启用后，刷新会更新现有的嵌入式星标文本。禁用后，嵌入式星标文本保持不变，可能显示比刷新后的星标计数更旧的值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, manual refresh warns if the GitHub token is missing or invalid.
ast.target: 启用后，手动刷新时如果 GitHub 令牌缺失或无效会发出警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GitHub Stars: No GitHub API token configured. Requests will use the lower unauthenticated rate limit. Add a valid token in plugin settings for higher limits.
ast.target: GitHub 星标：未配置 GitHub API 令牌。请求将使用较低的未认证速率限制。在插件设置中添加有效令牌以获得更高限制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GitHub API token was rejected. Retrying without authentication.
